name: Employer says not working when back hurt, denied—help?

mainEntity.name: Employer says not working when back hurt, denied—help?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Fight it: prove 'course and scope' via testimony, routine duties.** Utah judge ruled for worker[1]. **Key factors:** Location/time on clock, witnesses. **Practical guidance:** Appeal to Labor Commission, subpoena records. Won lost wages + impairment[1]. **Don't settle low.**
